questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "She studies every night because ___"
questions.answer: she has an important exam next week.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "My brother doesn't eat meat — ___"
questions.answer: he has been vegetarian since he was a child.
what time the library closes?

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Our teacher always arrives early and ___"
questions.answer: starts the lesson before the bell rings.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "They don't own a car, so ___"
questions.answer: they take the bus to work every day.

questions.prompt: My father _____ (work) in a big company in the city centre.
questions.answer: works
don't have

questions.prompt: _____ your sister speak any languages apart from English?
questions.answer: Does

questions.prompt: The shop _____ (close) at 9 p.m. every day.
questions.answer: closes

questions.prompt: They _____ (not know) anyone in this neighbourhood yet.
questions.answer: don't know

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "She don't like spicy food."
questions.answer: With 'she', use 'doesn't': 'She doesn't like spicy food.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "Does he works in a hospital?"
questions.answer: After 'does', use the base form (no -s): 'Does he work in a hospital?'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "They doesn't have a car."
questions.answer: 'They' takes 'don't', not 'doesn't': 'They don't have a car.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "My brother don't speaks French."
questions.answer: With 'my brother', use 'doesn't' + base verb: 'My brother doesn't speak French.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "Do she live near here?"
questions.answer: 'She' needs 'does', not 'do': 'Does she live near here?'
She jogs every morning.
They don't eat at home.
Does he speak English?
My sister doesn't work on Fridays.
Where do your parents live?
